name: Polkadot Arcade Game Template
tagline: Build any game with an on-chain leaderboard from a single prompt.
description: The Polkadot Arcade game template (lives in game-template/ of the arcade-dashboard repo): a turnkey shell that imposes chain access, product-account identity, signing, the leaderboard, and mobile/desktop styling — you write only a gameplay component that calls onGameEnd(score). Ships with Snake plus reference games, a PVM GCS leaderboard contract on Paseo Asset Hub Next, and a one-command pipeline that deploys and registers the game on the arcade dashboard.
